name: deen-system
description: Deen's personal-OS tooling for Claude Code: a context vault bootstrap, a session-handoff workflow, and a verified four-area team setup.

plugins.name: deen
plugins.description: Bootstrap a personal Deen OS context vault, keep session continuity with a handoff workflow, and verify the four-area setup (Claude Code practices, memory, handoff, Obsidian) with /deen:verify.

plugins.name: guardrails
plugins.description: Passive safety hooks active in every project (secret scanning, protected files, dangerous-command blocking, generated-dir protection) plus /guardrails:rules — evidence-based generator of path-scoped .claude/rules for a codebase. Derived from poshan0126/dotclaude (MIT), slimmed to complement the Superpowers/GSD/SDD/GStack stack.

plugins.name: studio
plugins.description: Web design & AI video toolkit: orbiting-sphere 3D hero website template (Three.js), property-listing-to-walkthrough-video pipeline (Apify + Higgsfield + ffmpeg), Seedance 2.0 storyboarding, and shot-by-shot AI video prompt building. Bring your own service accounts.
